run_summary.summary: One Flexsteel update. Ian checked in this morning asking about the Popfly application AND the concept pieces — Kenny responded at noon sharing the full 3-video concept in writing (Video 1: tribute to dad/80th bday + Father's Day via Steinhafels website + Flexsteel chair browsing; Video 2: Steinhafels shopping trip + chair testing; Video 3: reveal/gifting to dad). They were literally filming Video 1 as he typed. The Popfly platform access is still unresolved — Kenny asked Ian to reopen or set as an invite. Waiting on Ian to respond on both. Previous run had the concept right but missed that it's now been formally shared with Ian and that filming is actively underway.

suggestions.message: They started filming Video 1 today (tribute to Kenny's dad) but Ian still hasn't confirmed the Popfly campaign access. Kenny sent the 3-video concept to Ian in writing — worth following up tonight or tomorrow morning to make sure Ian reopened the campaign and responded to the concept. Don't want to finish all three videos before the campaign is officially in their system.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Ian on Popfly campaign access — Kenny sent 3-video concept today, filming Video 1 underway. Need Ian to reopen or invite Liz on the platform before all videos are done.
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Kenny replied to Ian's check-in with full 3-video concept in writing — started filming Video 1 same day. Campaign still not showing on Liz's Popfly dashboard; Kenny asked Ian to reopen or set as invite. Waiting on Ian to respond on both platform access and concept.
